headline: ON Semiconductor Extends Power Reach With GaNEXUS For AI And Industry
summary: ON Semiconductor (NasdaqGS:ON) has introduced its GaNEXUS gallium nitride power portfolio, expanding its presence in advanced power solutions. The GaNEXUS family targets AI data centers, industrial automation, and energy infrastructure with high efficiency and power density requirements. The portfolio includes smart, integrated FETs designed for demanding power electronics use cases. For investors tracking ON Semiconductor at a share price of $117.0, the GaNEXUS launch adds a fresh angle to...
